steps.title: Place the added value
steps.content: The added weight is $68$ pounds. From the histogram, this is greater than every original salmon weight.

steps.title: Check the median
steps.content: With $14$ original values, the median is the average of the $7$th and $8$th values. After adding a largest value, the new median is the $8$th value. This is not guaranteed to be greater, because the $7$th and $8$th values could be equal.

steps.title: Check the mean
steps.content: Adding a value greater than every original value means adding a value greater than the original mean. That must increase the mean.

steps.title: Select the guaranteed measure
steps.content: Only Statement II must be greater for the new data set. The answer is B.
